storylets.title: {=patron_letter_title}A letter under {LORD_NAME}'s seal
storylets.setup: {=patron_letter_setup}{LORD_NAME} calls for parchment. Wax. The seal he travels with, not the household one. He looks at you over the rim of a cup that has gone too warm. "Whose door, then. Tell me whose door, and I will write you in past it."

options.text: {=patron_letter_name_with_weight}A name with weight, lord. Someone whose word carries.
options.tooltip: {=patron_letter_name_with_weight_tt}+10 renown, +1 honor. Patron remembers the ambition.

options.text: {=patron_letter_anyone}Anyone who would take me. I am not particular.
options.tooltip: {=patron_letter_anyone_tt}+5 renown. The patron writes a generic introduction; doors will open, none of them grand.

options.text: {=patron_letter_blessing}Forget the letter. Your blessing is enough.
options.tooltip: {=patron_letter_blessing_tt}Patron warms toward you for not pressing. +5 relation with him.
